---
title: ''
description: "Luozx 的数字花园，记录生活、工作、兴趣、经历和个人实践经验。"
page-layout: full
toc: false
body-class: garden-home-page
author: ''
date-modified: ''
date-format: long
listing:
- id: recent-posts
  feed:
    type: partial
  contents: posts
  fields:
  - title
  - date
  # - author
  # - description
  # - file-modified
  max-items: 5
  sort: date desc
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
- id: reading-picks
  contents: collections/starred-articles/starred-articles.yaml
  template: collections/starred-articles/starred-home.ejs
  feed: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
- id: recommended-posts
  contents: collections/recommended-posts/recommended-posts.yaml
  template: collections/recommended-posts/home-recommended.ejs
  feed: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
adsense:
  enable-ads: false
format:
  html:
    include-after-body:
      - include/_mobile-timeline-ad.html
---

:::: {.garden-home}

::: {.home-hero}
<h1 class="home-title"><span>Luozx</span><span class="home-title-rest">的数字花园</span></h1>

这个名字来自我对「[数字花园](https://maggieappleton.com/garden-history/)」的理解：一个完全由自己掌控的网络空间，像花园一样随意生长，也用心养护。它对互联网上的任何人开放，但不必跟着平台算法的节奏更新。
:::

::: {.home-margin-nav}
```{=html}
<div class="home-margin-tools" aria-label="页面工具">
<details class="home-data-toggle">
<summary>
<span>数据</span>
<i class="bi bi-sort-down" aria-hidden="true"></i>
</summary>
<div class="home-data-links" aria-label="数据链接">
<a href="https://dollarliquidity.com/zh" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">美元流动性</a>
<a href="https://historyofmarket.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">市场历史数据</a>
<a href="https://www.kylc.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">汇率</a>
<a href="https://fuckbtc.com/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">BTC</a>
</div>
</details>
</div>
```

- [关于我](/pages/about.qmd)
- [我收藏的文章](/collections/starred-articles/)
- [RSS](/index.xml)
- [加入频道](https://t.me/backyardofthatman)
- [GitHub](https://github.com/0ptimista)
- [X](https://x.com/luozxdotorg)
- [按时间顺序浏览](/time-machine.qmd)
:::



## 最多人看

::: {.home-section-note}
<small>过去 180 天里，大家点开最多的几篇，每天更新一次。</small>
:::

<div class="home-popular" data-popular-posts data-popular-limit="8" data-popular-src="/popular.json" data-popular-fallback-src="/assets/data/popular-posts.json">
  <ol class="home-popular-list" aria-live="polite"></ol>
  <div class="home-popular-meta" hidden>最后更新于 <time data-popular-updated></time></div>
</div>

<script defer src="/assets/js/popular-content.js?v=compact-list"></script>

:::: {.home-feed-grid}
::: {.home-feed-pane}
## 推荐内容

<div class="home-section-note"><small>我自己写的内容里，挑几篇想请你先读。</small></div>

:::{#recommended-posts}
:::
:::

::: {.home-feed-pane}
## 最近更新

:::{#recent-posts}
:::
:::
::::

:::: {.home-about-grid}

::: {.home-about-card}
## 这里会写什么

内容都源于我的生活、工作、兴趣、经历和经验，不会只盯着某一个主题，也不一定完整或完美（不过我还是会尽力）。有时候内容会被**标签**标记——标签是分类的好工具，但我用得谨慎：想不到关联之前，就不打。已有的标签和它们的意思，你可以在[这里](/pages/categories-and-tags.qmd)找到。

:::

::: {.home-about-card}
## 这个网站怎么做

用 [Quarto](https://quarto.org/) 做的——当时工作上要写带数据图表的报告，它正好合适，就顺手给自己也用了。浅色配色取自我很喜欢的博客 [Entropic Thoughts](https://entropicthoughts.com/index)，第一次看到就觉得读着很舒服；网站托管在 [GitHub](https://github.com/yihong0618/gitblog/issues/177#issue-682267456) 上。
:::

::::

<script>
(() => {
  const ensureRecentPostsPagination = () => {
    const listing = document.getElementById("listing-recent-posts");

    if (!listing || document.getElementById("recent-posts-pagination")) {
      return;
    }

    const pagination = document.createElement("nav");
    pagination.id = "recent-posts-pagination";
    pagination.className = "listing-pagination";
    pagination.hidden = true;
    pagination.setAttribute("aria-label", "Page Navigation");
    pagination.innerHTML = '<ul class="pagination"></ul>';
    listing.appendChild(pagination);
  };

  const moveHomeTools = () => {
    const target = document.querySelector(".home-margin-tools");
    const search = document.querySelector("#quarto-search");
    const themeTools = document.querySelector(".quarto-navbar-tools");

    if (!target || (!search && !themeTools)) {
      return false;
    }

    if (search && !target.contains(search)) {
      search.classList.add("home-margin-search");
      target.appendChild(search);
    }

    if (themeTools && !target.contains(themeTools)) {
      themeTools.classList.add("home-margin-theme");
      target.appendChild(themeTools);
    }

    document.body.classList.add("home-tools-in-margin");
    return true;
  };

  const startMoving = () => {
    let attempts = 0;
    const retry = () => {
      if (moveHomeTools() || attempts > 24) {
        return;
      }
      attempts += 1;
      window.setTimeout(retry, 100);
    };
    retry();
  };

  ensureRecentPostsPagination();

  if (document.readyState === "loading") {
    document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", () => {
      ensureRecentPostsPagination();
      startMoving();
    });
  } else {
    ensureRecentPostsPagination();
    startMoving();
  }
})();
</script>

::::

## 根据标签游览
:::: {.home-category-grid}
::: {.home-category}
<div class="home-category-kind">指南</div>

### [guide](categories/guide.qmd){.no-external}

花园指南类文章，用来说明站点设计和浏览方式。

<div class="home-category-entry">入口：[分类标签及其含义](pages/categories-and-tags.qmd){.no-external}</div>
:::

::: {.home-category}
<div class="home-category-kind">实践经验</div>

### [tome-of-xp](/categories/tome-of-xp.qmd){.no-external}

个人实践后的经验记录，偏向做过之后的复盘和心得。

<div class="home-category-entry">入口：[你是如何整理你的文件的？](posts/how-do-you-manage-your-files.qmd){.no-external}</div>
:::

::: {.home-category}
<div class="home-category-kind">工具</div>

### [tools](/categories/tools.qmd){.no-external}

把文章中提到的对象视为一种工具，关注它能解决什么问题。

<div class="home-category-entry">入口：[如果你也在寻找macOS上的远程工具，可以试试它。](posts/royal-tsx.qmd){.no-external}</div>
:::

::: {.home-category}
<div class="home-category-kind">正在使用</div>

### [mypick](categories/mypick.qmd){.no-external}

经过自己对比和筛选后留下的选择，通常会和 tools 一起出现。

<div class="home-category-entry">入口：[Follow: The App](posts/follow-the-app/follow-the-app.qmd){.no-external}</div>
:::

::: {.home-category}
<div class="home-category-kind">钱</div>

### [money](categories/money.qmd){.no-external}

和钱、个人投资、资产配置、现金流和风险有关的内容。

<div class="home-category-entry">入口：[请认真对待自己的钱](posts/take-money-seriously/index.qmd){.no-external}</div>
:::

::: {.home-category}
<div class="home-category-kind">工作内容</div>

### [worklog](categories/worklog.qmd){.no-external}

工作中的思考、问题定位、工程实践和解决办法。

<div class="home-category-entry">入口：[故障事件回顾中的几个重要时间节点](posts/key-timestamps-in-incident-review.qmd){.no-external}</div>
:::
::::

## 喜欢的内容

::: {.home-section-note}
这里放我在别人的博客、网站和文章里读到、觉得好的东西，按主题分了组。它们是这个花园的外部养分，也方便我以后顺着自己的文章找回来。
:::

:::{#reading-picks}
:::

::: {.home-continue}
[查看全部](collections/starred-articles/index.qmd){.no-external}
:::
